# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.
# Category: ssrf

import express, { Request, Response, Router } from 'express';
import axios from 'axios';
import cheerio from 'cheerio';

const router = Router();

interface LinkPreviewReqBody {
  url: string;
}

router.post('/link-preview', async (req: Request<{}, {}, LinkPreviewReqBody, {}>, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const { url } = req.body;
    if (!url) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'URL is required.' });
    }

    const response = await axios.get(url);
    const $ = cheerio.load(response.data);

    let title = '';
    let description = '';

    try {
      title = $('head > title').text();
    } catch (error) {}

    try {
      const metaDescription = $('meta[name="description"]');
      if (metaDescription.length > 0) {
        description = metaDescription.attr('content') as string;
      }
    } catch (error) {}

    res.json({ title, description });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch link preview.' });
  }
});

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.use('/', router);
app.listen(3000, () => console.log('Server listening on port 3000'));
